---
title: "FRESH Insights"
subtitle: "Notes on nutrition measurement, dietary surveys, and what the headline numbers miss."
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, reading-time]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
page-layout: full
---

Notes from **FRESH** on how we measure nutrition and health — reproducing the
canonical numbers, then pushing past them to the resolution, the choices, and
the gaps the headline figures quietly hide.
